texto: On many occasions the curious atmospheric effects enchanted me vastly
autor: these including a strikingly vivid mirage - the first I had ever seen - in which distant bergs became the battlements of unimaginable cosmic castles.
explicacao: Citação de these including a strikingly vivid mirage - the first I had ever seen - in which distant bergs became the battlements of unimaginable cosmic castles. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “On many occasions the curious atmospheric effects enchanted me vastly” articula reflexao, h-p-lovecraft, occasions em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
